PRODUCTS.name: Bronx Elite Carry-On
PRODUCTS.description: The Bronx Elite Carry-On is the perfect companion for frequent travelers. Its sleek Midnight Black design combined with durable polycarbonate construction makes it both stylish and practical. Featuring 360-degree spinner wheels and a TSA-approved lock, this lightweight cabin-sized luggage ensures smooth navigation through busy airports while keeping your belongings secure.

PRODUCTS.name: Executive Leather Briefcase
PRODUCTS.description: Elevate your professional style with the Executive Leather Briefcase from Samsonite. Crafted from premium full-grain leather, this briefcase combines sophistication with functionality. The padded laptop sleeve keeps your device secure, while multiple compartments and a detachable strap offer versatile carrying options for the modern professional.

PRODUCTS.name: Adventure Pro Backpack
PRODUCTS.description: Adventure awaits with the Adventure Pro Backpack from North Face. Built with water-resistant nylon and 30L capacity, this versatile pack is designed for hikers, commuters, and travelers alike. The ergonomic straps and hydration sleeve make it your perfect companion for outdoor explorations and daily adventures.

PRODUCTS.name: Chic Travel Tote
PRODUCTS.description: Travel in style with the Chic Travel Tote from Tumi. This elegant Rose Gold tote combines ballistic nylon with premium leather trim for a sophisticated look. The add-a-bag sleeve and internal organization make it ideal for weekend getaways while maintaining its fashionable appeal.

PRODUCTS.name: Bronx Voyager Large
PRODUCTS.description: The Bronx Voyager Large suitcase is designed for extended trips and family vacations. With its expandable design and hard-shell protection in stunning Silver Metallic, it maximizes storage while protecting your belongings. Dual spinner wheels ensure effortless maneuvering through crowded terminals.

PRODUCTS.name: Urban Commuter Backpack
PRODUCTS.description: The Urban Commuter Backpack is perfect for daily commutes and day trips. Featuring a built-in USB charging port and breathable back panel, this lightweight Navy Blue pack keeps you connected while maintaining comfort throughout the day. With 20L capacity, it carries all your essentials without the bulk.

PRODUCTS.name: Traveler's Choice Spinner
PRODUCTS.description: Experience effortless travel with the Traveler's Choice Spinner from TravelPro. This ultra-lightweight cabin luggage features innovative self-aligning ball-bearing wheels for smooth navigation. The built-in USB port keeps your devices charged while the Charcoal color hides wear and tear perfectly.

PRODUCTS.name: Compact Crossbody
PRODUCTS.description: The Compact Crossbody from Patagonia combines eco-conscious design with everyday functionality. Made from recycled polyester, this vibrant Red bag features an adjustable strap for custom fit and multiple pockets for organization. Perfect for sustainable travelers who don't compromise on style.

PRODUCTS.name: Expedition Duffel
PRODUCTS.description: Take on any expedition with the Expedition Duffel from Osprey. This versatile Teal duffel is built from durable, water-resistant fabric and features removable backpack straps for flexible carrying options. Whether you're hiking, traveling, or heading to the gym, this bag adapts to your lifestyle.

PRODUCTS.name: Elite Rolling Backpack
PRODUCTS.description: The Elite Rolling Backpack from Delsey revolutionizes how you travel. Combining a retractable handle with multiple compartments and a padded laptop sleeve, this Blue backpack on wheels is perfect for business travelers who want both mobility and organization.

PRODUCTS.name: Carry-on Classic
PRODUCTS.description: The iconic Carry-on Classic from Rimowa represents the pinnacle of luggage engineering. Its aircraft-grade aluminum shell in elegant Silver provides unmatched durability and protection. With TSA-approved locks and a removable divider, this premium piece is an investment in travel excellence.

PRODUCTS.name: Softside Spinner
PRODUCTS.description: Travel in vibrant style with the Softside Spinner from Samsonite. This eye-catching Purple luggage features an expandable design to maximize storage and lightweight construction for easy handling. The four spinner wheels provide 360-degree maneuverability through any airport.

PRODUCTS.name: Outdoor Hiking Pack
PRODUCTS.description: Conquer any trail with the Outdoor Hiking Pack from North Face. With a generous 50L capacity and included rain cover, this Green pack is engineered for serious hikers. The adjustable torso and ergonomic design distribute weight comfortably even on long expeditions.

PRODUCTS.name: Leather Weekend Bag
PRODUCTS.description: Embrace timeless elegance with the Leather Weekend Bag from Bronx. Crafted from genuine leather in warm Tan, this versatile bag features a detachable strap for flexible carrying and a spacious interior perfect for weekend getaways or romantic escapes.

PRODUCTS.name: Rolling Duffel 2
PRODUCTS.description: The Rolling Duffel 2 from American Tourister combines functionality with fun. Featuring inline skate wheels for smooth rolling and water-resistant fabric, this Navy duffel is perfect for gym trips, weekend travels, or any adventure where durability and portability matter.

PRODUCTS.name: City Sling
PRODUCTS.description: Navigate the city with confidence using the City Sling from Osprey. This compact Black sling bag is fully waterproof, making it ideal for urban commuting and day trips. The adjustable strap ensures comfort, while the dedicated laptop pocket keeps your tech safe.

PRODUCTS.name: Business Brief
PRODUCTS.description: Make a statement in the boardroom with the Business Brief from Tumi. This sophisticated Black briefcase features Tumi Tracer technology for recovery if lost, premium leather handles, and multiple compartments for organizing important documents and equipment. Security and style in one package.

PRODUCTS.name: Traveler Backpack
PRODUCTS.description: Travel responsibly with the Traveler Backpack from Patagonia. Built entirely from 100% recycled materials, this Blue backpack proves eco-consciousness and performance aren't mutually exclusive. The laptop sleeve and side pockets provide excellent organization for your journeys.

PRODUCTS.name: Mini Crossbody
PRODUCTS.description: Less is more with the Mini Crossbody from Bronx. This charming Rose bag is perfectly sized for essentials yet features multiple pockets for smart organization. The adjustable strap allows you to wear it crossbody or on your shoulder for versatile styling.

PRODUCTS.name: Family Suitcase Set
PRODUCTS.description: Plan the perfect family vacation with the Family Suitcase Set from Samsonite. This 3-piece Gray set offers varying sizes for every family member's needs. The scratch-resistant exterior and spinner wheels ensure durability and easy maneuvering through airports for the whole gang.

PRODUCTS.name: Sport Duffel
PRODUCTS.description: Gear up for game day with the Sport Duffel from American Tourister. This vibrant Red duffel features a dedicated ventilated shoe compartment to keep gear fresh, padded strap for comfort, and water-resistant fabric to protect your equipment from the elements.

PRODUCTS.name: Pro Cycling Backpack
PRODUCTS.description: Peak performance on two wheels with the Pro Cycling Backpack from Osprey. The vibrant Yellow design includes reflective accents for visibility, helmet carry capability, and hydration bladder compatibility. Keep yourself hydrated and visible on every ride.

PRODUCTS.name: Vintage Leather Bag
PRODUCTS.description: Channel timeless Italian style with the Vintage Leather Bag from Bronx. This richly-toned Brown leather bag features an antique finish that improves with age. The adjustable strap and laptop sleeve make it both fashionable and functional for contemporary professionals.

PRODUCTS.name: Eco Tote
PRODUCTS.description: Make a difference with the Eco Tote from Patagonia. Crafted from 100% organic cotton, this lightweight Green tote is perfect for shopping, beach trips, or market visits. Reusable, revivable, and ready to reduce your environmental impact with every use.

PRODUCTS.name: Hardcase Cabin
PRODUCTS.description: Protection meets practicality with the Hardcase Cabin from Delsey. The rigid hardside shell in elegant Blue guards against impacts, while the gusseted expansion allows you to pack more without exceeding limits. TSA lock keeps your valuables secure throughout your journey.

PRODUCTS.name: Leather Shoulder Bag
PRODUCTS.description: Sophistication in black leather with the Leather Shoulder Bag from Tumi. Premium leather trim, secure zip closures, and multiple pockets keep your essentials organized while turning heads. Perfect for the woman who refuses to compromise on style or functionality.

PRODUCTS.name: Compact Carry-On
PRODUCTS.description: Go minimalist with the Compact Carry-On from TravelPro. Engineered for business travelers, this Gray suitcase fits perfectly in major airline cabin requirements. Four smooth wheels and a built-in USB port keep you mobile and connected on every trip.

PRODUCTS.name: Sport Backpack
PRODUCTS.description: Conquer any sport with the Sport Backpack from North Face. This Black pack features waterproof construction to shield your gear from weather, padded straps for comfort during intense activities, and side pockets for easy access to essentials during your workouts.

PRODUCTS.name: Designer Clutch
PRODUCTS.description: Shine bright with the Designer Clutch from Bronx. This eye-catching Gold clutch with metallic finish is perfect for evening events and special occasions. The detachable strap lets you wear it as a clutch or crossbody, while the secure zip closure keeps your valuables safe.

PRODUCTS.name: Rolling Garment Bag
PRODUCTS.description: Travel wrinkle-free with the Rolling Garment Bag from Samsonite. This Blue bag features an innovative hanger lock system to keep your clothes perfectly pressed, wheels for effortless transport, and multiple compartments for accessories and shoes. Arrives looking fresh, every time.

BRANDS.name: Bronx
BRANDS.description: Our signature line of high-quality, affordable luggage.

BRANDS.name: Samsonite
BRANDS.description: World leader in superior travel bags and luggage.

BRANDS.name: Tumi
BRANDS.description: Premium business and travel lifestyle brand.

BRANDS.name: North Face
BRANDS.description: Outdoor & adventure gear for every traveler.

BRANDS.description: Fun, colorful luggage for the everyday explorer.
